# Ostler vendored CM019 preferences ingest -- runtime dependencies
#
# Source of truth: CM019 services/ingest/requirements.txt, TRIMMED to the
# ingest CLI path that the installer's hydrate_preferences step actually runs
# (`python -m services.ingest.src.cli ingest-dir|ingest-email`). Every entry
# below was confirmed as a real import reachable from that CLI; everything the
# upstream listed for the server / Kafka / ML / enrichment surfaces is dropped
# because those code paths are never imported when hydrating preferences.
#
# Embeddings come from the local Ollama (nomic-embed-text, 768-dim) over HTTP
# via the vendored vectorizer.py swap -- NOT sentence-transformers -- so the
# entire torch/transformers/sklearn/nltk stack is gone. See vectorizer.py.

# Config + settings (config.py, enrich models)
pydantic>=2.5.0
pydantic-settings>=2.1.0

# CLI framework (cli.py). Upstream relied on this resolving transitively;
# we list it explicitly since nothing else here pulls it in.
click>=8.1.0

# HTTP: Ollama embed (vectorizer), Oxigraph + Qdrant loaders, RML mapper
httpx>=0.25.0

# Async file IO -- imported eagerly by ~20 parsers via parsers/__init__.py,
# so it is a hard import-time dependency of the ingest package.
aiofiles>=23.2.0

# HTML parsing for the eBay / YouTube / Pinterest parsers. Those parsers call
# BeautifulSoup(content, "lxml"), so the lxml backend is required, not optional.
beautifulsoup4>=4.12.0
lxml>=6.1.0

# Excel parsing for Disney+ GDPR exports (parsers/disney.py). msoffcrypto-tool
# handles password-protected workbooks.
openpyxl>=3.1.0
msoffcrypto-tool>=5.0.0

# Security floor: msoffcrypto-tool pulls in cryptography; keep the Snyk-pinned
# minimum that still applies to the surviving dependency tree.
cryptography>=46.0.5

# DROPPED versus upstream services/ingest/requirements.txt, with reasons:
#   fastapi, uvicorn[standard], python-jose[cryptography]
#       -> api.py FastAPI server + `from auth import require_auth`; never on
#          the CLI path. (auth is not even vendored.)
#   aiokafka            -> kafka_consumer.py; the CLI does not consume Kafka.
#   sentence-transformers, torch, transformers, nltk, sentencepiece,
#   scikit-learn, numpy, pillow
#       -> the ML embedding stack. Replaced by the Ollama HTTP vectorizer.
#   rdflib, orjson      -> not imported anywhere in the vendored tree (the
#                          Oxigraph loader talks SPARQL over httpx).
#   pyshacl, pandas     -> upstream pyproject extras; not imported on the
#                          ingest CLI path.
#   python-multipart    -> only api.py form uploads (server surface).
#   aiohttp, aiolimiter -> services/enrich only; enrichment is not wired for
#                          v1.0 (the hydrate step runs ingest, not enrich).
#   requests, urllib3, setuptools, wheel, zipp, filelock
#       -> Snyk floor pins for the removed ML/transitive tree; no longer
#          reachable, so not carried over.
